title: A Straw Hat Refuses to Fall
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on a straw hat refuses to fall, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: A Straw Hat Refuses to Fall. The crew enters Alubarna and splits into separate fights against Baroque Works’ strongest agents. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: They dodged it! Damn, those birds are feast!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: 2 of them split off and are headed south!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: They must be trying to reach the southern gates!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: The Southern Gates is where the rebels will strike! Then does that mean Vivi's one of those two...!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: Mr. 11 Two others also split off from their group just now!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Vivi might be one of them!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: They're headed for the Western Gates.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Out of the 5 gates to Alubarna, there're only 3 gates they can enter arriving from the West!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Their plan must be to split off and enter the city from each of those gates! Fine, we'll do the same and kill each of them inside the city!

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: Hey, some- one's coming up! Are they enemies!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No, wait! That's the super spot- billed duck squad! Let them through!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You did a good job following us all the way in!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You two have good instincts! You guessed right, I'm Vivil! <

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: WHAT THE HELL AR- I mean... WHAT are you saying? J'm the real Vivi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Allow me to show you who we really are!

summary: This part develops a straw hat refuses to fall and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
